headline: SM Energy's Strong Permian Footprint Signals Solid Growth Prospects
summary: SM's 237,000 Permian acres powered 49% of Q1 volumes as shares climbed 34% and valuation sits below peers.

headline: Mizuho sees opportunity in U.S. oil & gas as Iran crisis reshapes outlook
summary: Investing.com -- Mizuho struck a bullish tone on select U.S. oil and gas names, arguing that heightened geopolitical tensions have created a mispricing that investors can exploit.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Devon Energy, Raises Price Target to $68
summary: Mizuho  analyst Nitin Kumar   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $62 to $68.

headline: DVN Stock Falls Premarket, But This Analyst Sees 37% Upside Amid Bullish Oil Backdrop
summary: Barclays raised the price target on Devon Energy to $62 from $54 and kept an ‘Overweight’ rating on the shares.
